message:
docs(template): expand fastmcp_rust block to cover all 9 workspace crates

The previous revision commented out only the top-level fastmcp-rust
facade, which is usually not enough for local co-development: if a
contributor overrides only the facade while leaving fastmcp-core,
fastmcp-protocol, fastmcp-server etc. pointing at crates.io, cargo
pulls the facade from local and its transitive deps from the
registry — a confusing state where edits to fastmcp-core never
reach the facade at runtime.

List all nine workspace crates (fastmcp-rust, -core, -protocol,
-transport, -server, -client, -console, -cli, and -derive) as
commented-out path overrides so contributors can uncomment the
subset they actually want to hack on.  Note the one path quirk:
fastmcp-derive lives at fastmcp_rust/crates/fastmcp-macros (dir
name ≠ package name).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
